hawkish_phrases: risks to wider financing conditions remained
the rise recorded earlier in the year in these key indicators in the upstream segment of the transmission chain still posed a risk
credit standards for loans to firms had tightened for the third consecutive quarter
risks to this outlook could be assessed as tilted to the upside
market interest rates still stood at higher levels than those prevailing in December
dovish_phrases: continue to conduct net asset purchases under the PEPP...at a significantly higher pace than during the first few months of the year
underlying price pressures remained subdued in the context of significant economic slack and still weak demand
Ample monetary policy support remained crucial beyond the pandemic period
expected the key ECB interest rates to remain at their present or lower levels
Markets were not pricing in any changes in the deposit facility rate until the first quarter of 2024
summary: The Governing Council held all policy rates unchanged and reconfirmed continuation of significantly higher PEPP purchase pace, maintaining very accommodative stance amid subdued underlying inflation and significant slack despite short-term headline inflation volatility.
